question.label: Training lift
question.name: What part of your game are you most trying to sharpen at the moment?
question.description: Surfaces current personal motivation and where he is choosing to invest effort.

answer: goalie, and between waiting for the ball to come back to me, how i can consume as much chocolate as possible

assessment.note: He named goalie as the skill he wants to sharpen, showing some growth intent, while the chocolate aside suggests the answer was only partially focused rather than strongly invested.
